Home/AI for Teens/Prompt Playground

Prompt Engineering Playground

Learn how to get better AI responses by crafting better prompts

Choose a Challenge

Prompt Engineering

Choose techniques to improve the prompt:

Basic Prompt

Write a poem about rain

💡 Pro Tips:

  • • Be specific: More details = better results
  • • Set a role: AI performs better with clear context
  • • Give examples: Show what good looks like
  • • Specify format: Get exactly what you want
  • • Add context: Explain who the audience is

AI Response

Basic Response

Rain falls from the sky so high, Droplets falling, way up high. Pitter patter, here and there, Rain is everywhere.

Prompt Engineering Best Practices

📍 Be Specific

Vague prompts = vague responses. Include details about what you want, who it's for, and the desired format.

🎭 Set a Role

Tell AI what role to play: teacher, scientist, poet, etc. This dramatically improves output quality and tone.

📋 Show Examples

Provide examples of what good looks like. AI learns from patterns, so examples guide its response.

🎯 Specify Format

Tell AI exactly how you want the output: bullets, steps, tables, paragraphs, etc.

📚 Add Context

Explain the situation: audience, purpose, constraints. Context leads to contextual, relevant responses.

🔄 Iterate & Refine

First response not perfect? Follow up with feedback. AI improves with clarification and refinement.

Ready to master prompt engineering?
